# Lunar Cycles of Grace
## Scripture
"For the Lord is good and his love endures forever; his faithfulness continues through all generations." - Psalm 100:5

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we're reminded of the constant change and renewal that occurs in the lunar cycle. The moon waxes and wanes, a symbol of the ebbs and flows of our faith journey. Just as the moon's phases are a testament to the reliability of God's creation, our lives are a reflection of His enduring love and faithfulness. In times of fullness, we bask in the radiance of God's presence, and in times of darkness, we trust in His promise to guide us through. The lunar cycle teaches us to embrace the seasons of faith, knowing that each phase is a necessary part of our growth and transformation.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the lunar cycle, we're reminded of Your unwavering love and faithfulness. Help us to trust in Your goodness, even in the darkest of times. May we find comfort in the rhythms of Your creation and may our hearts be filled with the assurance of Your enduring presence. As the moon waxes and wanes, may our faith be strengthened, and may we reflect the light of Your love to a world in need. Amen.
